name: Source Chip
purpose: Compact provenance marker exposing where a fact came from and when it was captured.

structures.name: Provider Chip
structures.notes: Minimal chip naming the data source; dot reserved per provider family.

structures.name: Provenance Chip
structures.notes: Adds captured_at so the user can judge freshness inline.

structures.name: Snapshot Link
structures.notes: Links to raw_snapshot_ref by version/hash for full traceability.

interactionNotes: Free public sources and commercial adapters should be visually distinguishable but equally legible.
A stale state can dim the chip and add a small warning, prompting re-fetch.
